title: Erdős–Gyárfás Conjecture
next_action: Attack the taut s_min=3 rung: prove that no vertex-taut C4-free power-free (D)-gadget with S subseteq {3,4,5} exists — terminals at distance 3, every vertex on a short a-b path, K_{3,3}-e (blocked only by its C4s) is the shape to beat and C028 shows the target is empty through order 13 — or exhibit one, which disproves statement 0.1 via the L025 ring assembly. This is the first rung where power-freeness beyond C4 must carry the argument. Alternatives: minimal 1-atom structure theory (the disproof side's load-bearing unknown after L029); order-16 atom census (deferred). Pivot triggers: a taut pinched s_min=3 gadget found (disproof protocol); the rung closing with a generalizable mechanism (promote to the spread-doubling ladder); a stall after honest effort (switch to 1-atom structure or the census).
